text:
is a 1st year Attack Junior High School student.

Appearance

Samuel has gray eyes, dark brown hair which is parted in the center with two bangs and faint sideburns. He usually wears the standard boys uniform of the school.

Story

Samuel arrives at Attack Junior High School and is in class 1-4. He attends the first-year entrance ceremony, and later flees when Titans invade the area.

Samuel participates in the school's dodgeball tournament on Jean's team.

Following a challenge by the upperclassmen, Franz participates in the school's Sports Day games.

In the school's 104th festival, Samuel helps at Eren's cheeseburgers stand. He later flees when Titans appear and steal all of the food stands.

When teachers get in the way of Eren trying to head to the Titans' building to retrieve his chee-burgs, Samuel, along with his classmates stand up for him and come between them. He later watches Ilse Langnar's broadcast of Eren and the others venturing into the principal's office, and cheers once Eren manages to retrieve a chee-burg.
